candidate_functional_effect: state-dependent switch between null-space and tangent-direction parameter updates inside a narrow-basin safety region; 'contact ridge length' governs alignment stability

results.judge_justification: AsFT explicitly directs/constrains parameter updates relative to the alignment direction inside a narrow safety basin — functionally equivalent to the candidate's null-space-vs-tangent switching, with the additional caveat that AsFT prefers tangent-aligned (alignment-direction) and the candidate proposes null-space-first/tangent-second.
SafeConstellations steers along task-specific trajectories — direction-controlled steering close to tangent-projection idea, but different motivation (reduce over-refusal).
Boundary-aware geometric finetuning; constrains updates to keep solutions in workspace — partial overlap.
Constraint repair for navigation, not parameter-space alignment.
